Gamma-glutamyl Transferase (GGT) Test

Gamma-glutamyl Transferase (GGT) Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a gamma-glutamyl transferase (GGT) test? 
A gamma-glutamyl transferase (GGT) test measures the amount of GGT in your blood GGT is an enzyme. Enzymes are proteins that speed up certain chemical reactions in your body. Thousands of enzymes play an important role in all of your body functions. The GG
